hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --ignore-scripts && ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"; test -L "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules" || ln -sfn "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules"
